name: APEX Sports Hub
description: APEX Sports Hub is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Independence, MO. There are 12 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 8 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, food, trainers or lessons, water, lights, youth programming, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Banner Park
description: Banner Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lee's Summit, MO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Blue Springs Park
description: Blue Springs Park is a place to play pickleball in Blue Springs, MO. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The courts are free.

name: TM Fieldhouse
description:
🏆 Train. Compete. Elevate.

Step into the Premier Indoor Sports Facility — where next-level athletes are made. 

✅ 4 indoor multi-sport courts (basketball, volleyball, pickleball, futsal)
✅ MLB regulation infield + 7 batting/pitching lanes (baseball, softball, turf training, soccer training)
✅ Private golf simulator – The 19th Hole
✅ Full-service fast casual café – TM Fit
✅ Game-changing tech: HitTrax (baseball), Dr. Dish(basketball), Skill Attack (volleyball), Lobster (pickleball)
✅ Premium flooring and lighting
 
🎯 For athletes. For families. For the love of the game.
